title: Chapter Template Visual Backfill Batch
notes: Copy this plan to define one registry-only visual replacement batch for a real chapter. / 复制此模板，为真实章节定义一组只通过 asset registry 执行的视觉替换批次。

rollback.notes: Rollback by removing the chapter override so runtime falls back to the shared binding. / 通过删除章节 override 回滚，让运行时回退到共享绑定。

verification.notes: List the gameplay loops that must stay green after this visual swap. / 列出视觉替换后仍需保持绿色的 gameplay 闭环。

replacementEntries.notes: Describe why this asset belongs in the batch and what parity goal it serves. / 说明这个资源为何属于本批次，以及它服务于哪种一致性目标。
